title: DisabilityProfile
description: Schema for a disability profile used in accessibility evaluation configuration

disability_type.description: Human-readable name of the disability type

description.description: Brief description of the disability and its web accessibility implications

assistive_technologies.description: Assistive technologies commonly used by people with this disability

wcag_criteria.description: List of WCAG success criteria most relevant to this profile

priority.description: Priority of this criterion for this disability profile

test_type.description: How this criterion is best evaluated

rationale.description: Why this criterion matters for this disability profile

test_types.description: Breakdown of evaluation approach for this profile

automated.description: Criteria that can be checked automatically

manual.description: Criteria that require manual human evaluation

legal_contexts.description: Legal frameworks that reference this profile's criteria
